title: D&D 5e SRD 5.1
description: Seed records for the D&D 5th Edition Systems Reference Document 5.1. Full records will be generated by the 0m9.5 importer.

license.attributionText: This work includes material taken from the System Reference Document 5.1 ("SRD 5.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC and available at https://dnd.wizards.com/resources/systems-reference-document. The SRD 5.1 is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License available at https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/legalcode.
license.provenancePolicy: Every record names the SRD page it was extracted from when the upstream record carries a page; pageless records cite the SRD section as the locator.
license.outputRestrictions: Preserve the SRD 5.1 attribution text on redistributed records and derivatives.

source.recordProvenancePolicy: Each record names the SRD page it was extracted from when the upstream record carries a page; pageless records cite the SRD section as the locator.
